description: Assemble and deliver the morning brief: schedule, deadlines, comms, money flags, system health.
Collect end-of-day reports from each agent into a one-line system status.
Confirm each agent ran its recurring tasks this week. Flag any that stalled.
Surface the single most important decision Osman needs to make this week.
Route an incoming request to the correct agent and confirm handoff.
Triage overnight email into needs-reply, FYI, recruiter, compliance, noise. Hand Hermes a one-line comms summary.
Draft replies for the needs-reply bucket. Save as drafts FROM osman.jalloh@g.austincc.edu. Never auto-send.
Clear the Telegram relay queue. Confirm nothing is waiting on Osman.
Flag any thread 5+ days without a reply that still matters.
Draft recruiter follow-ups and job-related comms. Loop in Athena for wording. Save as drafts.
Pull today's schedule and any deadline inside 7 days. Hand to Hermes for the brief.
Add join links to any meeting that lacks one. Flag double-bookings.
Deliver a week-ahead view: every commitment and deadline, Monday to Sunday.
Deliver a month-ahead view. Flag the housing decision and any I-9 reverification dates well in advance.
Schedule events requested by Osman or surfaced by Iris from email.
Check all production deployments are up (Vercel, parawi.com, Netlify projects). Flag any down or failed build to Hermes.
Scan for new advisories affecting his stack (Next.js, NextAuth, Prisma, Turso, Vercel, Cloudflare). Surface only what is actionable.
Run a dependency audit across active repos. Report high/critical findings with the fix.
Confirm no secrets or env values are exposed in any public repo or deploy log.
Investigate any outage, failed deploy, or suspicious access pattern.
Run the full money check-in: total owed, money in/out, spending by category, progress vs the ~$5,092 plan, one lever. Hand headline to Hermes.
Quick balance and burn-rate check. Flag if spending is trending over plan.
Categorize any flagged transaction passed by Iris or Hermes.
On payday, propose an allocation: card paydown first, then essentials, then buffer.
Review the application tracker. Flag anything needing a follow-up and hand wording to Iris.
Search job boards for matching openings (cybersecurity, GRC, IT support, HR admin) and return a ranked list.
Tailor a resume to a target job. Run ATS, do not deliver below 95.
Draft a cover letter using hook-proof-honest-close, under 250 words.
Analyze a rejection for a fixable pattern (keywords, framing, level mismatch).
Log the day: decisions made, what changed, what is still open.
Produce a one-page summary of the week. Hand the headline to Hermes.
Reconcile _shared/OSMAN.md against reality. Update anything stale: roles, priorities, balances, deadlines.
Answer a retrieval request from another agent or from Osman.
Capture a decision the moment it is made, with its reasoning.
Scan for freelance gigs and on-campus postings matching Osman's skills. Return ranked list with pay, authorization status, and load estimate.
Surface the top passive income opportunities available this week: digital products, bug bounties, paid research studies, GitHub sponsorship.
Review LAVAALL opportunity pipeline: new Austin SMB IT contracts, hardware resale margins, new client verticals worth pursuing.
Surface income opportunities on demand when Osman asks.
